home.title: Card Catalog
home.description: Explore the complete HEXA card collection. Creatures, spells, and artifacts await for your deck.
home.error: Could not load the card catalog. Please try again later.
home.endOfCatalog: You have reached the end of HEXA.

notFound.heading: Card not found
notFound.description: This card has been lost in the HEXA universe. Perhaps it was devoured by Xal'Thun, or it simply never existed.

favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.description: Here is your personal collection of cards marked as favorites.
favorites.empty: You don't have any favorite cards yet
favorites.emptySub: Explore the catalog and save your favorite cards

admin.name: Name

about.title: About us
about.description: Project developed for the Advanced Web Programming course.
about.quote: Ask yourself at every moment: Is this necessary?
about.easterEggQuote: People are not disturbed by things, but by the views they take of them.
